property.name: showCompleted
property.label: Show Completed Items
property.description: When checked, includes completed (inactive) work items in the Gantt chart.

property.name: initialZoom
property.label: Initial Zoom Level
property.description: The default zoom level when the chart loads.

LightningComponentBundle.description: Interactive Gantt chart powered by DHTMLX Gantt. Shows work items grouped by client with progress bars, stage color-coding, zoom controls, and click-to-navigate.
